stories.title: Fever's Clark first with 40-point, 10-assist game
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark scored a career-high 45 points and had 10 assists for the first 40-10 game in WNBA history, and the Indiana Fever beat Seattle 110-107.

stories.title: LeBron still mum as 'trust the process' sparks tiz...
stories.summary: LeBron James finished off the fourth of four public appearances scheduled around the first two days of Fanatics Fest on Friday, and just like in the three that came before it Thursday, James kept his upcoming free agency decision to himself.

stories.title: Messi praises Yamal, calls baby photo 'incredible'...
stories.summary: Argentina captain Lionel Messi called his viral 2007 photo with a baby Lamine Yamal "incredible" on Friday, ahead of their historic matchup in Sunday's World Cup final.

stories.title: 2-shot penalty stalls DeChambeau's Day 2 surge
stories.summary: The R&A assessed Bryson DeChambeau a two-stroke penalty following his second round in the 154th Open Championship for an infraction on the fifth hole.

stories.title: MLB restricts AI use on iPads; Ottavino cites Mets...
stories.summary: Major League Baseball is restricting iPad usage in dugouts to prevent the tablets from running artificial intelligence to help make strategy decisions, and former reliever Adam Ottavino said the Mets' use of technology helped prompt the move.
